🛒🛒Dior new jeans made of imported Turkish pure cotton denim fabric. The color is vibrant, breathable, and has a slim fit design with a slightly stretchy fabric that is versatile and durable. Jacket and pants set with Dior Oblique trim and straight-cut design. Customized twilight cloud knit fabric enhances arm lines for a slim and powerful look. DIOR cotton twill work pants in black feature a high-density blended fabric with anti-static and water-repellent treatment. The pants have a structured feel, good drape, and are resistant to pilling and deformation. They come with a dual adjustment design at the waist with a drawstring and metal snap button. The side cargo pockets are crafted with 3D cutting and reinforced edges, adorned with metal letter logos. The pants are meticulously sewn with lockstitch finishing, reinforced crotch seams, and cuffed hems. The straight-leg silhouette is tailored for a versatile and stylish look suitable for various occasions. Available in sizes 46-56 for both men and women. Size measurements provided.

Dior cotton twill cargo pants are enzyme-washed and pre-shrunk, creating a crisp yet soft texture with wrinkle-resistant and durable properties. Classic cross-stitched reinforcement at the crotch, folded and stitched hems, straight-cut silhouette with precise panel alignment and meticulous stitching, seamlessly blending practicality with Dior's craftsmanship. Straight and delicate seams, comfortable and soft fabric, consistent color matching for stylish coordination, suitable for various occasions, custom hardware, complete with three labels, unisex design. Sizes: 46-48-50-52-54-56. Measurements provided for each size.

The cotton fiber provides excellent skin-friendly feel and moisture-wicking breathability, keeping the skin dry and comfortable at all times; while the polyester fiber gives the shorts outstanding durability, wrinkle resistance, and maintains its shape even after prolonged wear, making it easy to care for. The classic blue and white color scheme with the iconic jacquard pattern showcases the brand's style and fashion taste. The elastic waistband with drawstring design allows for easy adjustment and accommodates different waist sizes, ensuring a comfortable and unrestricted fit. The side stripe decoration adds a subtle highlight and visually enhances the leg line. Sizes available: XS-L.

Top and shorts set from Dior 2025Ss collection, featuring a new cotton striped embroidered short-sleeve shirt and shorts. Made from blue striped cotton twill fabric, with an elegant silhouette and Cistian Couture embroidery on the front. Can be paired with various t-shirts to create a classic and refined look. Sizes available: S-XL.

Dior's new logo denim jeans, made of imported Turkish pure cotton denim fabric. The color is vibrant, breathable, and features a slim fit design with a slightly stretchy fabric. Versatile and durable, it maintains its shape and color even after repeated washing. Over time, the color will become more natural, resulting in an excellent fit. The design is elegant and innovative, yet always maintains a noble and elegant style and taste, interpreting fashion charm. The straight-leg cut is a fashionable must-have. Available in sizes 29-40, excluding 35 and 37.
